bonuses.leadin: Two answers required. A building designed by one of these two architects, the Lloyd’s Building, sits across the street from the other’s Willis Building. For 10 points each:
bonuses.leadin_sanitized: Two answers required. A building designed by one of these two architects, the Lloyd's Building, sits across the street from the other's Willis Building. For 10 points each:
parts: Name these pioneers of high-tech architecture who met at Yale. These two architects and their future spouses, Su Brumwell and Wendy Cheesman, founded the firm Team 4, which designed the Reliance Controls factory.
Both the Lloyd’s Building and the Willis Building are in this city, where Foster later designed The Gherkin.
After separating from Foster, Rogers collaborated with this architect on a building whose exterior is covered with color-coded tubes. This architect also designed the tallest building in London.
parts_sanitized: Name these pioneers of high-tech architecture who met at Yale. These two architects and their future spouses, Su Brumwell and Wendy Cheesman, founded the firm Team 4, which designed the Reliance Controls factory.
Both the Lloyd's Building and the Willis Building are in this city, where Foster later designed The Gherkin.
After separating from Foster, Rogers collaborated with this architect on a building whose exterior is covered with color-coded tubes. This architect also designed the tallest building in London.
answers: Renzo Piano (The buildings are the Centre Pompidou and The Shard.)
answers_sanitized: Renzo Piano (The buildings are the Centre Pompidou and The Shard.)

packet.name: E - Chicago A, Toronto B, Brandeis B, JHU A
